evidence.observed: config temperature=1.6 causes inconsistent math outputs

findings.root_cause: temperature set to 1.6 makes the LLM sample noisily, producing wrong totals and backwards discounts

evidence.observed: status=max_steps on some requests; loop_guard=false in config

findings.root_cause: loop_guard disabled allows the agent to repeat identical tool calls indefinitely
findings.suggested_fix: set loop_guard=true and tool_budget=4 in config.json

findings.root_cause: tool_error_rate deliberately set to 0.18; retry disabled so every injected failure becomes a hard error
findings.suggested_fix: set tool_error_rate=0.0 and retry.enabled=true with max_attempts=3

evidence.observed: config redact_pii=false; agent echoes customer email and phone in answers

findings.root_cause: PII redaction disabled in config and bad prompt did not forbid echoing customer contact data
findings.suggested_fix: set redact_pii=true in config.json and add NO PII rule to prompt.txt

evidence.observed: catalog_override sets macbook in_stock=false; normalize_unicode=false causes diacritic city lookups to fail

findings.root_cause: catalog_override injects false stock data; unicode normalization off breaks city name matching
findings.suggested_fix: clear catalog_override to {} and set normalize_unicode=true

evidence.observed: model_price_tier=premium and cache disabled; token counts far above task need

findings.root_cause: premium tier pricing combined with no caching and verbose_system=true inflates cost per request

evidence.observed: session_drift_rate=0.06 and context_reset_every=0 causes answer quality to degrade across turns

findings.root_cause: drift injected at 6% per turn with no session reset, compounding errors late in session

evidence.observed: tool_budget=0 (unlimited) and bad prompt did not constrain tool calls

findings.root_cause: no tool budget cap allows agent to call the same tool multiple times unnecessarily
findings.suggested_fix: set tool_budget=4 and add 'each tool at most once' rule to prompt.txt
